# Documentation Registry

**Generated from:** `docs/reference/registry/DOC_REGISTRY.yaml`
**Generated:** 2026-04-20
**Generator:** `scripts/build_doc_registry_md.py`
**Source of truth:** DOC_REGISTRY.yaml — do not edit this file directly.

---

## Governance Model Legend

### doc_class

| Value | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `entrypoint` | Navigation only — points to other docs, makes no factual claims |
| `active` | Currently maintained documentation with named authority |
| `generated` | Mechanically refreshed from source artifacts |
| `historical` | Archived, superseded, or non-authoritative |

### authority_kind (for active and generated docs)

| Value | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `plan` | Goals, sequencing, decisions, prioritization |
| `blueprint` | Intended design, expected implementation, interface contracts |
| `guide` | Operational or development procedure |
| `current_config` | What source artifacts currently define |
| `runtime_evidence` | What has been verified in a running environment |
| `null` | Not applicable (entrypoint or historical) |

---

- **Total registered docs**: 8
- **By `doc_class`**: `active`=6, `entrypoint`=1, `generated`=1
- **By `authority_kind`**: `current_config`=2, `guide`=5

## Registry Table

| doc_id | path | doc_class | authority_kind | title | primary_audience | status | notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| INDEX_md | docs/INDEX.md | entrypoint | — | [YOUR-PROJECT-NAME] — Repository Index | both | active | Universal repo entrypoint. Navigation only — no mutable facts. All task classes route through this doc first. |
| REFERENCE_md | docs/REFERENCE.md | active | guide | [YOUR-PROJECT-NAME] — Where Is the Truth? | both | active | Where-is-the-truth map. Update when new current_config or runtime_evidence surfaces are added, or when a known transitional state is resolved. |
| AGENT_WORKFLOW_md | docs/development/AGENT_WORKFLOW.md | active | guide | Agent Workflow — Task Routing and Read-Order Rules | agents | active | Normative routing document for agents. If an agent needs freeform search to complete a task, this doc is underspecified — update it. |
| CLAUDE_md | CLAUDE.md | active | guide | CLAUDE.md — Agent Instruction Surface | agents | active | Agent instruction surface. Authoritative for behavioral rules. Mutable facts (IPs, ports, service health) belong in current_config or runtime_evidence docs, not here. |
| DOCUMENTATION_MAINTENANCE | docs/development/DOCUMENTATION_MAINTENANCE.md | active | guide | Documentation Maintenance — Procedures and Expectations | both | active | — |
| RELEASE_CHECKLIST | docs/development/RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md | active | guide | Release Checklist — Pre-Release Documentation Checks | agents | active | — |
| DOC_REGISTRY_YAML | docs/reference/registry/DOC_REGISTRY.yaml | active | current_config | Documentation Registry — Canonical YAML | agents | active | Source of truth for the registry. DOC_REGISTRY.md is a generated human-readable view derived from this YAML. When adding new docs, update this YAML first, then run python scripts/build_doc_registry_md.py to regenerate. |
| DOC_REGISTRY_MD | docs/reference/registry/DOC_REGISTRY.md | generated | current_config | Documentation Registry — Human-Readable View | humans | active | Generated view of DOC_REGISTRY.yaml. Do not edit directly — update DOC_REGISTRY.yaml and run python scripts/build_doc_registry_md.py to regenerate. |

---

## Task Routing Quick Reference

The registry assigns `task_entry_for` to help agents and humans find starting points.

| Task Class | Declared Entry Doc(s) |
|---|---|
| `implement_change` | `INDEX_md`, `CLAUDE_md` |
| `investigate_runtime_issue` | `INDEX_md`, `CLAUDE_md` |
| `operate_or_release` | `INDEX_md`, `CLAUDE_md` |
| `refresh_current_docs` | `INDEX_md`, `CLAUDE_md`, `DOC_REGISTRY_YAML` |
| `test_or_operate_dev_environment` | `INDEX_md` |
| `update_plan_or_roadmap` | `INDEX_md` |

---

## Regeneration

Run `python scripts/build_doc_registry_md.py` after updating `docs/reference/registry/DOC_REGISTRY.yaml`.
